title: A2AAcpIndex
description: Append-only cross-session index of agent-to-agent (A2A), agent coordination protocol (ACP) and MCP endpoints. Stored at opencode+/opencode_claw/.compactor/knowledge/a2a-acp-index.json. Append-only: dedup by `id`; existing records keep their facts (transport, endpoint, agent_card_url) and add to `capabilities` (union).

endpoint.description: URL, unix socket, or command invocation. Verbatim from discovery.

capabilities.description: Union of capabilities observed across all sessions.
